title: Chef Aid 14.5cm Long Handled Metal Sieve, Kitchen Essential Tool and Ideal for Straining, draining, Washing and Wide Range of Foods, with a fine mesh for Ease of use
features: EVERYDAY BASIC: The Chef Aid metal kitchen strainer is an everyday essential items and perfect for home use
STRAINING: This Kitchen tool is perfect for Rinsing and Straining a variety of foods to include Rice, Grain, Pulse Beans, Fruits and Vegetables

14CM DIAMETER: Measuring 14cm / 5.5 Inches in diameter this is ideal for separting and washing Pulse Beans, Rice and Fruit for larger portion sizes, the built in rest will help the sieve sit over the bowl
HANDWASH: Handwashing suggested to keep you item in pristine condition
CHEF AID: From an extensive selection of Baking and Icing products from Chef Aid
